# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-microservices
  labels:
    app: my-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-service
          image: my-service-image:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-microservices
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: my-service

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-microservices
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-microservices
        - source:
            requestPrincipals: ["*"]
  target:
    name: my-service
    kind: Server

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: DelegatedAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-delegated-auth
  namespace: my-microservices
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-microservices
            requestPrincipals: ["*"]
      target:
        name: my-service
        kind: Server
